utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified: property details include type, location, size, rooms, features, price, and availability; financing includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, amortization, and fees; legal_services include total costs and breakdown; moving_services include level, cost, and inclusions; setup_services include utility package and additional features with costs; total_budget includes all cost components and totals. All items are complete and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a 'Detached House' in East End, Toronto, priced at CAD $835,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match based on price and description is the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K, rating 6), since it is the only one near that price and offers garden space and larger family-oriented features. The financing method is 'Mortgage' with 10% down payment, which aligns with the 'First-Time Buyer' category under purchase_financing (rating 10). Legal fees of CAD $1200 match the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service costs CAD $650, which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). The utility package is 'basic' costing CAD $120, which maps to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 5). The smart home and security addon costing CAD $800 matches the 'Smart Home Package' (rating 10).
